reviews.review_description:
I work at a hospital and provide VR to patients to give them fun activities to play with, and this game is a great learning experience. Many kids (obviously) are scared of the doctors when I comes to surgery, and many want a step by step explanation. This experience not only makes it very digestible for kids and very inviting, but it eases a lot of stress. 
One kid, who was going into surgery, only complained that you yourself cannot perform surgery on the narwhal-ha! I told them that thats a job for doctors only. Even with that, they were getting ready to go into surgery and didn't appear to look at surgery with a negative outlook. It's very easy to use and very replayable. Even if you've never used VR before, it's very simple to play.

Totally recommend for anyone that has kiddos or patients who may be gearing up to go into surgery in the future.
Really great and well made app for kids to familiarize themselves with pre-op procedure and take some of the stress away. 5 Stars
Really fun interactive game. Super cute animations and a easy to understand flow

What a fantastic way to prepare kids for surgery! Even the sounds are realistic, from the blood pressure cuff to the sounds in the operating room. Very immersive so a child can know what to expect
and lessen their anxiety. Excited to share with other parents.

I cant express how much this helped my child! Where was this app years ago???
It eased his mind so much! Watching the animation kept a smile on his face as the whale walked him through the process. This app helped my son relax and lessen the fear. As his mom, it gave me great comfort to be able to provide this resource to ease my childs anxiety. This should be available at all childrens hospitals and possibly for adults as well.
Thank you for this beautifully done app! It really helped my son! 👍😀

reviews.review_title: This app is how VR can make a difference
reviews.review_description: As VR grows I am excited to see developers show new and innovative ways this technology can effect our lives in a positive way. I can't wait to see how this app will make surgery prep for kids and adults safer and less stressful.

This game is downright adorable. Clearly meant for youth with upcoming surgeries, it walks players through the process of preparing for the operation in a simplified, kid friendly way. This is a great way to comfort kids and teach them what to expect. Super well made!
Great idea turned into a great game. I think this game is very friendly and will help kids feel more comfortable about operations. This is a very clever way of using VR to help people.

A fun and interactive way to show kids the details of what will happen before their surgery. This game is a realistic and engaging way to let kids understand and get a feel for what’s happening. I’m excited for this project to be put out for all kids to use and experience!
This Surgery Prep simulator is an amazing way of visualizing surgery prep for kids!

Downloaded Surgery Prep and can see how this can be extremely helpful for children who are unsure and afraid of the hospital or surgery. The animals are cute, environment friendly and color scheme easy on the eyes. I can see kids enjoying this app.
